final_prompt.prompt:
Create a WeChat public account article cover for a fragrance product launch.

Style/medium: needs a "高级质感风" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Kinfolk magazine minimalist editorial, Céline campaign stillness, 侘寂 (wabi-sabi) material heritage; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be centered composition
Subject: must highlight the title as the focal element
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: needs an autumn-inspired palette — exact color selection is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香" (title, prominent), "染秋香氛新品发布" (theme)
Constraints: must be 900x500 aspect ratio
Avoid:
